name: Paper Ape Lab
description: Paper trading simulator with 10,000 paper USDC, PnL, ROI, win rate, average entry, sample size, and drawdown.
degenPitch: Ape with fake money first. Earn the right to be dangerous later.
whatItDoes: Records paper trades and profile stats.
Shows PAPER badge and sample-size warnings.
cursorPrompt: Build a Paper Ape Lab using DNA x402. Create a 10,000 paper USDC account, record paper trades, show PnL, ROI, win rate, average entry, sample size, drawdown, and a PAPER badge.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Paper Ape Lab using DNA x402. Create a 10,000 paper USDC account, record paper trades, show PnL, ROI, win rate, average entry, sample size, drawdown, and a PAPER badge.
